vision_report.narrative_description: The audit began with a low-light capture of the desk, showing the presence of the pots but failing to resolve the biological state of the specimens. Subsequent images (T-1 and CURRENT) show a complete loss of visual data. As an expert observer, I cannot validate the health of the plants when the environment is in total darkness. I recommend immediate restoration of the fixed camera LED or ambient light source to continue the audit.
